sentences.text: This extension provides the minimal set of instructions needed to enable scalar support of the BF16 format.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions

sentences.text: It enables BF16 as an interchange format as it provides conversion between BF16 values and FP32 values.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions

sentences.text: This extension depends upon the single-precision floating-point extension `F`.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions

sentences.text: This extension includes six instructions: the `FCVT.BF16.S` and `FCVT.S.BF16` instructions, defined below, and the `FLH`, `FSH`, `FMV.X.H`, and `FMV.H.X` instructions, defined in .
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions

sentences.text: BF16 bits:: [wavedrom, , svg] .... {reg:[ {bits: 7, name: 'frac'}, {bits: 8, name: 'expo'}, {bits: 1, name: 'S'}, ]} ....
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format

sentences.text: While BF16 (also known as BFloat16) is not an IEEE 754 standard format, it is a valid floating-point format as defined by IEEE 754-2008, with radix 2, number of significand digits 8, and maximum exponent 127.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format

sentences.text: BF16 computational instructions defined in this chapter support all IEEE 754-2008 features, including all rounding modes, subnormal inputs and outputs, overflow and underflow, and default exception handling.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format

sentences.text: Tininess is detected after rounding.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format

sentences.text: The BF16 canonical NaN is `0x7fc0`.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format

sentences.text: BF16 values are NaN-boxed when held in `f` registers, as described in .
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format

sentences.text: Synopsis:: Convert FP32 value to a BF16 value
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format > fcvt.bf16.s

sentences.text: Mnemonic:: fcvt.bf16.s rd, rs1
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format > fcvt.bf16.s

sentences.text: Encoding:: [wavedrom, , svg] .... {reg:[ {bits: 7, name: '1010011', attr: ['OP-FP']}, {bits: 5, name: 'rd'}, {bits: 3, name: 'rm'}, {bits: 5, name: 'rs1'}, {bits: 5, name: '01000', attr: ['bf16.s']}, {bits: 2, name: '10', attr: ['h']}, {bits: 5, name: '01000', attr: 'fcvt'}, ]} ....
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format > fcvt.bf16.s

sentences.text: Description:: Narrowing convert FP32 value to a BF16 value.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format > fcvt.bf16.s

sentences.text: Round according to the RM field.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format > fcvt.bf16.s

sentences.text: This instruction is similar to other narrowing floating-point-to-floating-point conversion instructions.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format > fcvt.bf16.s

sentences.text: Exceptions: Overflow, Underflow, Inexact, Invalid
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format > fcvt.bf16.s

sentences.text: Synopsis:: Convert BF16 value to an FP32 value
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format > fcvt.s.bf16

sentences.text: Mnemonic:: fcvt.s.bf16 rd, rs1
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format > fcvt.s.bf16

sentences.text: Encoding:: [wavedrom, , svg] .... {reg:[ {bits: 7, name: '1010011', attr: ['OP-FP']}, {bits: 5, name: 'rd'}, {bits: 3, name: 'rm'}, {bits: 5, name: 'rs1'}, {bits: 5, name: '00110', attr: ['bf16']}, {bits: 2, name: '00', attr: ['s']}, {bits: 5, name: '01000', attr: 'fcvt'}, ]} ....
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format > fcvt.s.bf16

sentences.text: Description:: Converts a BF16 value to an FP32 value.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format > fcvt.s.bf16

sentences.text: This instruction is similar to other widening floating-point-to-floating-point conversion instructions.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zfbfmin` Extension for Scalar BFloat16 Conversions > BF16 Number Format > fcvt.s.bf16
